titleStmt.title: SII 30.91: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 91. (A.R. No. 168 of 1915.) Tirumukkūdal, Madurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District. Veṅkaṭēśa Perumāḷ temple—on the same wall Rājēndra-Chōḻa I: year 11: 1023 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the praśasti of Parakēsarivarman Rājēndrachōḻadēva I. It records the gift of 90 sheep for burning a perpetual lamp to the temple of Mahāvishṇu at Tirumukkūḍal, a part of Śri Madurantakach-chaturvedimaṅgalam, which was an autonomous village (taṉiyūr) of Kaḷattūrk-kōṭṭam, a sub-division in Jayaṅgoṇḍasoḻamaṇḍalam, by certain Veṇkāḍaṉ Umaiyāṉ Kuḻali, a resident of Dāmōdarachēri in Vembaṟṟūr alias Amaṉinārāyaṇach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, a brahmadēya of Maṇṇi-nāḍu, a sub-division of Rājēndrasiṅga-vaḷanāḍu situated on the northern bank of Chōḻa-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumanni vaḷara Iruni
la maṭanntaiyum porccayappāvai
yuñ cirttanic celviyun=taṉ pe
run teviyarāki yiṉpuṟa neṭitiyalū
ḻiyu ḷiṭaituṟai nāṭu n=taṭarvana
velip paṭar vanavāciyuñ cuḷḷicū
ḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkiyu naṇṇa
ṟkarumuraṇ maṇṇaikkaṭakkamum
porukaṭaliḻattaraiyar tammuṭi
yu māṅkavar teviya roṅke
ḻil muṭiyu muṉṉavar pakkalt
teṉṉavar vaitta cun=taramuṭiyu
mintiranāramu(k) n=teṇṭirai Īḻama
ṇṭala muḻuvatumeṟipaṭaik ke
raḷar muṟaimaiyiṟ cūṭuṅ kula tana
mākiya palarpukaḻ muṭiyuñ ceṅkati
r mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait to
l peruṅkāvaṟ palpaḻan=tivuñ ce
ruviṟ cinavilirupattoru kāla
raicu kaḷaikaṭṭa paracurāmaṉ meva
ruñcān=timattivaraṇ karuti Irutti
ya cempoṟ tiruttaku muṭiyum payaṅ
koṭu paḻimika muyaṅkiyil mutukiṭ
ṭoḷitta cayaciṅkaṉ Aḷappa
rum pukaḻoṭum pīṭiyal Ilaṭṭapā
ṭi Eḻaraiyilakkamu navanetik kula
pperu malaikaḷum vikkiramavirar ca
kkarakoṭṭamu mutirpaṭavallai maturamaṇṭalamuṅ kāmiṭai vaḷanāmaṇaik koṇaiyum veñcilaivi
rar pañcappaḷḷiyum pā(y)caṭaippaḻana mācuṇitecamum Ayarvil vaṇ kirtti Ātinakaravaiyiṟ can=tiraṉ tolkulattin=tirarataṉai viḷaiyamarkkaḷat
tuk kiḷaiyoṭum piṭittup palacanattoṭu niṟaik kulatanakkuvaiyuñ ciṭṭaruñcerimiḷai yoṭṭaviṣeyamun=taṉmapālaṉai vem muṉaiyaḻittu vaṇṭu
ṟaicolait taṇṭapputtiyu miraṇacūraṉai muraṇukat tākkit tikkaṇai kīrttit takkaṇalāṭamu n=toṭukaḻaṟ caṅkuvoṭoṭṭaṉ mayipālaṉai veñcama viḷāka
t tañcuvittaruḷi Oṇṭiṟal yāṉaiyoṭu peṇṭir paṇṭāramu nittila neṭuṅkaṭa luttiralāṭamum veṟimalart tīrttatteṟipunaṟ kaṅkaiyu māpporu taṇṭāṟ ko
ṇṭa kopparakesaripanmarāna śrīrājentra coḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 1 Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu kaḷattūrk koṭṭattu taniyūr śrīma
turān=taka śaturvetimaṅkalattu(tu) tirumukkūṭal māhaviṣuṇaRead mahāviṣṇukkaḷukkuc coḻanāṭṭu vaṭakarai rājentraciṅka vaḷanāṭṭu maṇṇināṭṭu brahmadeyam
vempaṟṟūrāṉa Amaninārāyaṇaccaturvetimaṅkalattu dāmotaracceri veṇkāṭaṉ Umaiyān kuḻali vaitta tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟiṉukku
nicatam ney Uḻakkiṉukku vaitta cāvāmuvāp perāṭu toṇṇūṟu ..
Digital edition of SII 30.91 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
